title: erigeron glandulosus var. mixtus
intro: Erigeron glandulosus var. mixtus, also known as the rough fleabane or mixed-downy fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Erigeron glandulosus var. mixtus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
